entries.source: "Opportunity cost"
entries.value: "Opofferingskoste"

entries.source: "Should a company enter this market?"
entries.value: "Moet 'n maatskappy hierdie mark betreden?"

entries.source: "What makes an argument valid?"
entries.value: "Wat maak 'n argument geldig?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Socratic Instruction on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: 'n praktiese gids vir die gebruik van Socratic Instruction op inspir vir basisleer, met prompts, studielusse en veiliger AI-gewoontes.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: 'n sterker studielus

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI-tutor

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Vra om 'n klein eerste stap in plaas van 'n definitief antwoord.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Vra die AI om jy redenasie te kontroleer, nie net wat resultaat.

entries.source: Build a hypothesis.
entries.value: Bou 'n hypothese op.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Sluit af deur die idee uit wat geheugen terug te skryf.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Grondslae

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Leerders wat deur 'n onderwerp wil dink, aannames wil toets en blywende begrip wil bou.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts om te probeer

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Sokratiese AI-tutor vir dieper begrip is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: stap 'n konsep, argument, probleem, teks of besluit om in 'n gefokusde keten van vrae. Jy buddy luistert na elke antwoord, bring aannames en hiaten in kaart en duwt jy na jy eie eindsynthese. Probeer: "Help my understand geleentheidskoste."

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding: practical guide
entries.value: Sokratiese AI-tutor vir dieper begrip: praktiese gids

entries.source: Socratic Instruction
entries.value: Sokratiese Onderrig

entries.source: Start the live mode at Socratic Instruction. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Collaborative Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Begin die lewendig modus by Socratic Instruction. Wil jy 'n verwante leervorm, probeer dan Collaborative Instruction. Vir 'n breer beeld van die platform lees jy wat 'n AI-leermaat vir almal sou moet doen.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Vertel die modus wat jy probeert te leer of te maak.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Dat verschil zie jy in die flow. In plek van een enorme reaksie bewegen die beste sessies deur 'n lus: stel 'n doel, probeer iets, krijg terugvoer, herstel die swak plek en kies die volgende aksie.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Die focus is belangrik. 'n algemene chatbot kan byna alles beantwoorde, maar 'n leermodus geeft wat gesprek vorm. Die stuurt jy na wat soort dink, oefen, terugvoer of verkennen waardoor die idee bly hangen.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Die tutor vra een vraag op 'n slag, wag vir jou redenasie en sintetiseer eers nadat jy dit probeer het.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hierdie is dieselfde gewoonte agter studeren met AI sonder jezelf te besluitdriegen: hou die leerder aktief. AI is wat nuttigst wanneer wat terugvoer geeft op jy dink.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Hierdie modus is vooral nuttig vir leerders wat wil:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Probeer die stap in jy eie woorde.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a clearer model.
entries.value: Verander verwarring in 'n duideliker model.

entries.source: Use hints before answers.
entries.value: Gebruik wenke vir antwoorde.

entries.source: Use Socratic Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gebruik Socratic Instruction wanneer jy 'n sessie wil wat vinnig begin maar homself toch aan jou aanpas. Die eerste doel is nie om indrukwekkend te kskakel. Die eerste doel is om die volgende stap haalbaar te laat voel.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Waar hierdie modus by help

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Waar jy hierna natoe kan

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Jy kan ook begin met 'n ruwe versie van jou regte probleem. 'n rommelige eerste prompt is prima. Die sessie kan wat vlak, die teikengroep, sperdatum en styl verduideliken zodra jy begint.
